snippet.title: The Side Door: Operation Varsity Blues
snippet.description:
In 2019, federal prosecutors unsealed the college admissions case known as Operation Varsity Blues. It exposed a side door into elite schools: rigged tests, fake athletic profiles, sham charity payments, and a market where access could be quietly bought.

This Prime Documentary follows the machinery behind the scandal, the families who paid, the students whose knowledge varied, the universities treated as victims, and the legal aftermath. William Rick Singer pleaded guilty. Lori Loughlin and Mossimo Giannulli pleaded guilty to fraud conspiracy. This film does not claim any child knew unless the public record supports it.

Chapters:
00:00 The Side Door
00:08 The Three Doors
02:50 The Fixer
08:30 The Two Machines
15:45 The Families and the Taken Seat
22:30 The Reckoning
27:20 What the Scandal Did Not Touch

Visuals are symbolic reconstructions, AI-generated stills, licensed factory atmosphere, and motion graphics. No real-person likenesses, real university logos, crests, mascots, or landmarks are used.

Independent educational documentary. This is not legal advice.

Subscribe for documentaries about the hidden systems behind everyday life.

#OperationVarsityBlues #CollegeAdmissions #Documentary #TrueCrime #Education
